name: Dj 8 Beats: Infinite
detailed_description:
A fictional DJ who thinks he lives in the real world starts producing a diss track for an internet stalker, but in reality he is its creator

DJ 8 Beats is a collection of mini arcade games, which can be played individually or in INFINITE 8 mode that mixes the games.

The game also has Ranking lists showing the 8 best players in each game.

- 8 is Infinite -


This game is a love letter to the entertainment industry

As games nowadays are released unfinished,

this one is also being released incomplete,

Count on the day 1 patch for fixes, and the day 8 update patch

* No expansions will be sold separately
** We know this is not an industry practice, but we have to be different in some way, right?

- Ideal Multimidia
